provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Keth arthropod mid-molt inside a private growth-chamber — cracked old chitin shell on the floor in jagged pieces, the Keth emerging pale and soft and trembling, new exoskeleton not yet hardened, temporarily translucent showing internal structures beneath, bioluminescent veins flickering weakly, four arms bracing against the chamber walls, vulnerable and newborn, warm amber light
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Strong hit — concept reads clearly, style consistent, gritty lived-in aesthetic.
